Arenas_Challenge_Tie.en-US: {{silver}}The challenge between {{lime}}{0}{{silver}} and {{lime}}{1}{{silver}} ended in a tie.

Arenas_Challenge_Waiting.en-US: {{silver}}Waiting for {{lime}}{0}{{silver}} to respond to the challenge.

Arenas_Challenge_Request.en-US: {{silver}}You have been challenged by {{lime}}{0}{{silver}}. Use {{lime}}!{1} {{silver}}to accept or {{lime}}!{2} {{silver}}to decline.

Arenas_Challenge_InvalidTarget.en-US: {{lightred}}Invalid target. You can only challenge players by their name.

Arenas_Challenge_InChallenge.en-US: {{lightred}}Challenge can only be requested if both players are not already in a challenge.

Arenas_Challenge_NotInArena.en-US: {{lightred}}Challenge can only be requested if both players are in the arena.

Arenas_Challenge_NotChallenged.en-US: {{lightred}}You have no challenge requests or they have expired.

Arenas_Command_ClientOnly.en-US: {{lightred}}This command can only be used by clients.

Arenas_Command_NoPerm.en-US: {{lightred}}You do not have permission to use this command.

Arenas_Command_ServerOnly.en-US: {{lightred}}This command can only be used by the server.

Arenas_Chat_QueueAdded.en-US: {{silver}}You have been added to the queue. Your position is {{lime}}{0}{{silver}}.

Arenas_Chat_QueuePosition.en-US: {{silver}}You are in position {{lime}}{0}{{silver}} in the waiting queue.

Arenas_Chat_RoundPreferencesAdded.en-US: {{silver}}You have added {{lime}}{0}{{silver}} to your round preferences.

Arenas_Chat_RoundPreferencesRemoved.en-US: {{silver}}You have removed {{lime}}{0}{{silver}} from your round preferences.

Arenas_Chat_RoundPreferencesAtLeastOne.en-US: {{lightred}}You cannot disable all rounds. At least one round must be enabled.

Arenas_Chat_ArenaRoundStart.en-US: {{silver}}You are in arena {{lime}}{0}{{silver}} playing {{lime}}{1}{{silver}} against {{lime}}{2}{{silver}} opponent(s).

Arenas_Chat_ArenaCommands.en-US: {{silver}}You can change your preferences with {{lime}}!{0}{{silver}} and {{lime}}!{1}{{silver}}.

Arenas_Chat_ArenaAfkHint.en-US: {{silver}}You can go to AFK mode with {{lime}}!afk{{silver}}.

Arenas_Chat_AfkReminder.en-US: {{lightred}}You are still AFK. Use {{gold}}!afk {{lightred}}again to disable it.

Arenas_Chat_AfkEnabled.en-US: {{silver}}You are now AFK. Use {{gold}}!afk {{silver}}to disable it.

Arenas_Chat_MenusUnavailable.en-US: {{lightred}}The preference menu is unavailable (MenuManager not installed).

Arenas_Chat_WeaponPreferencesAdded.en-US: {{silver}}You have added {{lime}}{0}{{silver}} to your weapon preferences.

Arenas_Admin_NoArenas.en-US: {{lightred}}No arenas are currently active (map may not have paired spawns).
